idx_admin_audit_log_conflict_open.name: idx_admin_audit_log_conflict_open
idx_admin_audit_log_conflict_open.where: ((conflict_key IS NOT NULL) AND (resolved_at IS NULL))

idx_appointment_records_phone_not_delete.name: idx_appointment_records_phone_not_deleted
idx_appointment_records_phone_not_delete.where: ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (phone_normalized IS NOT NULL))

online_intake_attachments_check.name: online_intake_attachments_check
online_intake_attachments_check.value: ((attachment_type = 'file'::text) AND (s3_key IS NOT NULL)) OR ((attachment_type = 'url'::text) AND (url IS NOT NULL))

uq_reminder_journal_snooze_dedupe.name: uq_reminder_journal_snooze_dedupe
uq_reminder_journal_snooze_dedupe.where: ((occurrence_id IS NOT NULL) AND (action = 'snoozed'::text) AND (snooze_until IS NOT NULL))

reminder_journal_check.name: reminder_journal_check
reminder_journal_check.value: ((action = 'snoozed'::text) AND (snooze_until IS NOT NULL)) OR ((action <> 'snoozed'::text) AND (snooze_until IS NULL))

chk_reminder_occurrence_snooze_pair.name: chk_reminder_occurrence_snooze_pair
chk_reminder_occurrence_snooze_pair.value: ((snoozed_at IS NULL) AND (snoozed_until IS NULL)) OR ((snoozed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (snoozed_until IS NOT NULL))

idx_reminder_rules_linked_object.name: idx_reminder_rules_linked_object
idx_reminder_rules_linked_object.where: ((linked_object_type IS NOT NULL) AND (linked_object_id IS NOT NULL))

chk_reminder_rules_custom_only_for_custo.name: chk_reminder_rules_custom_only_for_custom_type
chk_reminder_rules_custom_only_for_custo.value: (linked_object_type = 'custom'::text) OR ((custom_title IS NULL) AND (custom_text IS NULL))

chk_reminder_rules_custom_required.name: chk_reminder_rules_custom_required
chk_reminder_rules_custom_required.value: (linked_object_type IS DISTINCT FROM 'custom'::text) OR ((custom_title IS NOT NULL) AND (btrim(custom_title) <> ''::text))

chk_reminder_rules_object_id_required.name: chk_reminder_rules_object_id_required
chk_reminder_rules_object_id_required.value: (linked_object_type IS NULL) OR (linked_object_type = 'custom'::text) OR ((linked_object_id IS NOT NULL) AND (btrim(linked_object_id) <> ''::text))
